isaacsim-5.1.template_policy: Legacy unscoped templates are treated as 5.1-only unless explicitly tagged otherwise.
isaacsim-5.1.qa_policy: Existing QA tasks, personas, and controller matrices are 5.1-baseline unless tagged with runtime_profiles or isaac_sim_versions.

blocked: isaacsim.ros2.nodes.* node type strings in generated 5.1 code
6.0-only docs/templates unless the task is migration analysis

isaacsim-6.0.template_policy: Only templates explicitly tagged for isaacsim-6.0, 6.0, 6.0.0, or any may be used.
isaacsim-6.0.qa_policy: 6.0 QA evidence must be tagged, copied into a 6.0-specific task, or recorded as a migration finding.

allowed: pxr and omni.usd APIs for conservative cross-version USD edits
isaacsim.ros2.nodes.* node type strings for new ROS2 graph code
blocked: 5.1 bridge recipes saved as 6.0 known-good without live validation
isaacsim.ros2.bridge.* node type strings in generated 6.0 code

artifact_rules.templates: Add runtime_profiles, isaac_sim_versions, or version_scope before a template is used outside the 5.1 lane.
artifact_rules.code_patterns: Save verified snippets to code_patterns_<version>.jsonl and include runtime_profiles, isaac_sim_versions, and isaac_lab_versions metadata.
artifact_rules.qa_docs: Use Runtime Scope metadata in new QA docs. Unscoped old QA docs are 5.1-baseline.
artifact_rules.research_reports: May mention multiple versions, but conclusions must name which profile they apply to.
artifact_rules.launchers: Use explicit --version when reproducing QA or known-good evidence.
